message:
feat: add HTTP/2 client with TLS 1.3 and libdeflate gzip

- Complete gzip compress/decompress using libdeflate (2-3x faster than zlib)
- HTTP/2 client with stream multiplexing and HPACK compression
- TLS 1.3 with AES-NI acceleration for secure PyPI connections
- Automatic gzip decompression of HTTP responses
- Remove old zlib-based gzip, consolidate to single libdeflate impl
